description: This pipeline annotates data with a unique id. It generates an annotation, then assigns it to the data.

f76c16df-bef2-4572-88df-80df847ac6b0.name: generate-unique-annotation
f76c16df-bef2-4572-88df-80df847ac6b0.description: Generates a unique annotation for each row based on its index. The annotations will have the format (Base name)[(row index)]

e7bc48e6-b51a-4048-b0d3-f508c42b9128.name: generate-unique-annotation
e7bc48e6-b51a-4048-b0d3-f508c42b9128.description: Generates a unique annotation for each row based on its index. The annotations will have the format (Base name)[(row index)]

5fa5808d-37a7-46cf-9346-1644dd9fd5eb.name: annotate-set-single
5fa5808d-37a7-46cf-9346-1644dd9fd5eb.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions
